content.text:
<timestamp>Tuesday, Jul 7, 2026, 10:31 AM (UTC+7)</timestamp>
<user_query>
Remote 26.100.144.211 WinRM usr1cv8/usr1cv8. Boxed Error was fixed by correcting corrupt shift.obj in SQLite. Kassa was NOT running after fix - needs Admin interactive session.

Do:
1. Start kassa using PsExec -i 1 with Admin or via schtasks StartKassa211, try multiple methods until moysklad-kassa processes stay running 60s+
2. Use C:\Users\Public\start-kassa-ready.bat
3. After 45s check app.log for new lines: access token, any Boxed Error
4. Verify shift.obj still valid JSON in sqlite (not re-corrupted)
5. If kassa won't stay up remotely, create/update schtask to run at logon AND run now with highest privileges interactive

Return: kassa running yes/no, process count, log snippet, user action needed if any.
</user_query>

Starting kassa on the remote host via WinRM and checking the repo for existing scripts.

[REDACTED]

input.command: Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 50 FullName; rg -l "26.100.144.211|StartKassa|start-kassa" "C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey" 2>$null
input.description: List repo files and search for remote kassa scripts

input.command: dir "C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey"; type "C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\desktop-note-remote.txt" 2>$null; type "C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\piot-cdp.ps1" 2>$null | Select-Object -First 100
input.description: List workspace and read remote-related files

input.command: Select-String -Path "C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\*.py","C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\*.ps1" -Pattern "144.211|shift\.obj|app\.log|start-kassa|PsExec|Invoke-Command" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { "$($_.Filename):$($_.LineNumber): $($_.Line.Trim())" }
input.description: Search project for remote kassa and sqlite paths
Test WinRM session to 26.100.144.211

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred = New-Object PSCredential ('usr1cv8', $sec)
$opt = New-PSSessionOption -SkipCACheck -SkipCNCheck -SkipRevocationCheck
$s = New-PSSession -ComputerName 26.100.144.211 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -SessionOption $opt
Invoke-Command -Session $s -ScriptBlock {
  @(
    'C:\Users\Public\start-kassa-ready.bat',
    'C:\Windows\System32\PsExec.exe',
    'C:\Tools\PsExec.exe',
    'C:\PsExec.exe'
  ) | ForEach-Object { "$_ : $(Test-Path $_)" }
  schtasks /Query /TN StartKassa211 /FO LIST /V 2>&1
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\*\AppData\Local\moysklad*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select FullName
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files*\MoySklad*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Recurse -Depth 2 | Select-Object -First 20 FullName
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\Public' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Name
}
Remove-PSSession $s
input.description: Discover remote kassa paths, PsExec, schtask

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred = New-Object PSCredential ('usr1cv8', $sec)
$opt = New-PSSessionOption -SkipCACheck -SkipCNCheck -SkipRevocationCheck
$s = New-PSSession -ComputerName 26.100.144.211 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -SessionOption $opt
Invoke-Command -Session $s -ScriptBlock {
  Get-Content 'C:\Users\Public\start-kassa-ready.bat' -Raw
  Get-ChildItem -Path C:\ -Filter PsExec*.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 4 | Select-Object -First 5 FullName
  Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Users' -Filter app.log -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 6 | Select-Object -First 10 FullName,Length,LastWriteTime
  Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Users' -Filter *.db -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 8 | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match 'kassa|moysklad' } | Select-Object -First 15 FullName
}
Remove-PSSession $s
input.description: Read start bat, find PsExec, app.log, sqlite db

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred = New-Object PSCredential ('usr1cv8', $sec)
$opt = New-PSSessionOption -SkipCACheck -SkipCNCheck -SkipRevocationCheck
$s = New-PSSession -ComputerName 26.100.144.211 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -SessionOption $opt
Invoke-Command -Session $s -ScriptBlock {
  Test-Path 'C:\Users\Public\PsExec.exe'
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files (x86)\MOYSKL*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select FullName
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files (x86)\MoySklad*' -Recurse -Depth 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'app\.log|\.db|sqlite' } | Select FullName,Length,LastWriteTime
  $appdata = "$env:APPDATA\..\Local"
  Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'moy|kassa|sklad' }
  Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA" -Recurse -Depth 4 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'app.log' -or $_.Name -match '\.db$' } | Select-Object -First 20 FullName,LastWriteTime
}

  where.exe sqlite3 2>$null

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred = New-Object PSCredential ('usr1cv8', $sec)
$opt = New-PSSessionOption -SkipCACheck -SkipCNCheck -SkipRevocationCheck
$s = New-PSSession -ComputerName 26.100.144.211 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -SessionOption $opt
Invoke-Command -Session $s -ScriptBlock {
  Get-Content 'C:\Users\Public\fix-shift.sql' -Raw
  Get-Content 'C:\Users\Public\kassa-fix.log' -Tail 30 -Encoding UTF8
  $sqlite = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\Public\sqlite-tools' -Filter sqlite3.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName
  "sqlite3=$sqlite"
  if ($sqlite) {
    & $sqlite 'C:\Users\Public\retail_diag.sqlite' "SELECT key, length(value) FROM kv WHERE key='shift.obj';"
    & $sqlite 'C:\Users\Public\retail_diag.sqlite' "SELECT substr(value,1,120) FROM kv WHERE key='shift.obj';"
  }
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\usr1cv8' -Filter 'retail*.sqlite' -Recurse -Depth 10 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select FullName,Length,LastWriteTime
}
Remove-PSSession $s
input.description: Read fix scripts and verify shift.obj in sqlite

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred = New-Object PSCredential ('usr1cv8', $sec)
$opt = New-PSSessionOption -SkipCACheck -SkipCNCheck -SkipRevocationCheck
$s = New-PSSession -ComputerName 26.100.144.211 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -SessionOption $opt
Invoke-Command -Session $s -ScriptBlock {
  $sqlite = 'C:\Users\Public\sqlite-tools\sqlite3.exe'
  cmd /c "dir /s /b C:\Users\usr1cv8\*retail*.sqlite 2>nul"
  cmd /c "dir /s /b C:\ProgramData\*retail*.sqlite 2>nul"
  cmd /c "dir /s /b C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\*.sqlite 2>nul"
  & $sqlite 'C:\Users\Public\retail_diag.sqlite' ".tables"
  & $sqlite 'C:\Users\Public\retail_diag.sqlite' "SELECT obj FROM shift WHERE id='S_c1566556-5973-49c9-ad78-9d675e371635_Shift';"
  & $sqlite 'C:\Users\Public\retail_diag.sqlite' "SELECT count(*) AS bad FROM shift WHERE instr(obj,'{$type:com.lognex')>0;"
}

input.description: Find live retail.sqlite and verify shift.obj JSON

input.command: Get-Content "C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\terminals\389004.txt" | Select-Object -Last 30
input.description: Read latest output from terminal 389004

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred = New-Object PSCredential ('usr1cv8', $sec)
$opt = New-PSSessionOption -SkipCACheck -SkipCNCheck -SkipRevocationCheck
$s = New-PSSession -ComputerName 26.100.144.211 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -SessionOption $opt
$result = Invoke-Command -Session $s -ScriptBlock {
  $sqlite = 'C:\Users\Public\sqlite-tools\sqlite3.exe'
  $candidates = @(
    'C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\retail.sqlite',
    'C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\data\retail.sqlite',
    'C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\logs\retail.sqlite',
    'C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Local\moysklad-kassa\retail.sqlite'
  )
  $found = @()
  foreach ($p in $candidates) { if (Test-Path $p) { $found += $p } }
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\logs' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Name,Length
  $diag = 'C:\Users\Public\retail_diag.sqlite'
  $shiftObj = & $sqlite $diag "SELECT obj FROM shift WHERE id='S_c1566556-5973-49c9-ad78-9d675e371635_Shift';" 2>&1 | Out-String
  $bad = & $sqlite $diag "SELECT count(*) FROM shift WHERE instr(obj,'{$type:com.lognex')>0;" 2>&1 | Out-String
  $logPath = 'C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\app.log.2026-07-07'
  $logLinesBefore = (Get-Content $logPath -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Line).Lines
  $logTailBefore = Get-Content $logPath -Tail 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

  # Method 1: schtasks
  schtasks /Run /TN StartKassa211 2>&1 | Out-String
  Start-Sleep -Seconds 5
  $procs1 = @(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Path -like '*moysklad-kassa*' -or $_.Name -like '*CC57*' -or ($_.MainWindowTitle -like '*МойСклад*') }).Count
  if ($procs1 -lt 1) {
    $procs1 = @(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.ExecutablePath -like '*moysklad-kassa*' }).Count
  }

  # Method 2: direct bat via PsExec if still down
  if ($procs1 -lt 1) {
    Start-Process -FilePath 'cmd.exe' -ArgumentList '/c C:\Users\Public\start-kassa-ready.bat' -WindowStyle Hidden
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 8
  }

  # Method 3: PsExec kassa exe directly session 1
  $procs2 = @(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'moysklad|CC57|electron' -or $_.ExecutablePath -like '*moysklad-kassa*' })
  if ($procs2.Count -lt 1) {
    $kassaExe = (Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files (x86)\moysklad-kassa\*.exe' | Where-Object { $_.Name -notmatch 'Uninstall' } | Select-Object -First 1).FullName
    & 'C:\Users\Public\PsExec.exe' -accepteula -i 1 -d -u usr1cv8 -p usr1cv8 "`"$kassaExe`"" 2>&1 | Out-String
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 8
  }

  # wait total ~65s from start for stability check
  Start-Sleep -Seconds 52
  $procsFinal = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.ExecutablePath -like '*moysklad-kassa*' -or $_.Name -match 'moysklad|electron' }
  $names = $procsFinal | Select-Object Name,ProcessId,SessionId,ExecutablePath

  Start-Sleep -Seconds 45
  $logTailAfter = Get-Content $logPath -Tail 25 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
  $logLinesAfter = (Get-Content $logPath -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Line).Lines
  $tokenLines = Select-String -Path $logPath -Pattern 'access token|Boxed Error|boxed' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 8

  # live sqlite if exists
  $liveShift = $null
  foreach ($db in $found) {
    $liveShift = & $sqlite $db "SELECT obj FROM shift WHERE id='S_c1566556-5973-49c9-ad78-9d675e371635_Shift';" 2>&1
    break
  }
  if (-not $found -and (Test-Path $diag)) {
    $liveDb = & $sqlite $diag "PRAGMA database_list;" 2>&1
  }

  [pscustomobject]@{
    FoundDbs = $found
    DiagShiftObj = $shiftObj.Trim()
    DiagBadCount = $bad.Trim()
    ProcCount = @($names).Count
    Procs = $names
    LogLinesBefore = $logLinesBefore
    LogLinesAfter = $logLinesAfter
    TokenLines = $tokenLines | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }
    LogTail = $logTailAfter
    LiveShift = $liveShift
  }
}
Remove-PSSession $s
$result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5
input.description: Start kassa, wait, check logs and shift.obj

input.command: for ($i=0; $i -lt 25; $i++) { Start-Sleep 5; $t = Get-Content "C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\terminals\397768.txt" -Raw; if ($t -match 'exit_code') { break } }; Get-Content "C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\terminals\397768.txt" | Select-Object -Last 80
input.description: Poll until kassa start script completes

input.description: Read full output of kassa start job

input.description: Wait 90s for long remote job completion

input.command: Get-Content "C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\terminals\397768.txt" | Select-Object -Last 50
input.description: Check if job 397768 finished

input.command: Get-Content "C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\agent-tools\be3647ab-c893-4170-b59e-8d4e2d4a74b2.txt" | Select-Object -Last 120
input.description: Read end of kassa job output file

input.command: Select-String -Path "C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\agent-tools\be3647ab-c893-4170-b59e-8d4e2d4a74b2.txt" -Pattern "ProcCount|DiagShiftObj|DiagBadCount|FoundDbs|TokenLines|LogLinesAfter|Name.*moysklad" | Select-Object -First 40
input.description: Extract key fields from kassa job JSON output

input.command: Get-Content "C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\agent-tools\be3647ab-c893-4170-b59e-8d4e2d4a74b2.txt" | Select-Object -Skip 18 -First 25
input.description: Read FoundDbs and ProcCount section from output
Find retail.sqlite path from Public fix logs
List retail*.sqlite in kassa roaming and check shift.obj

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred = New-Object PSCredential ('usr1cv8', $sec)
$opt = New-PSSessionOption -SkipCACheck -SkipCNCheck -SkipRevocationCheck
$s = New-PSSession -ComputerName 26.100.144.211 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -SessionOption $opt
Invoke-Command -Session $s -ScriptBlock {
  $db = 'C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\retail_2fd01358-8160-11ef-0a80-0325000aa865.sqlite'
  $sqlite = 'C:\Users\Public\sqlite-tools\sqlite3.exe'
  & $sqlite $db "SELECT id, substr(obj,1,200) FROM shift;"
  & $sqlite $db "SELECT count(*) bad_java FROM shift WHERE instr(obj,'{$type:com.lognex')>0;"
  & $sqlite $db "SELECT count(*) good_json FROM shift WHERE instr(obj,'`"`$type`"')>0;"
  try { $null = ConvertFrom-Json ((& $sqlite $db "SELECT obj FROM shift LIMIT 1;" 2>&1) -join '') } catch { "JSON parse: $($_.Exception.Message)" }
}
Remove-PSSession $s
input.description: Query live retail sqlite shift.obj validity

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred = New-Object PSCredential ('usr1cv8', $sec)
$opt = New-PSSessionOption -SkipCACheck -SkipCNCheck -SkipRevocationCheck
$s = New-PSSession -ComputerName 26.100.144.211 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -SessionOption $opt
Invoke-Command -Session $s -ScriptBlock {
  $sqlite = 'C:\Users\Public\sqlite-tools\sqlite3.exe'
  foreach ($db in @(
    'C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\retail_2fd01358-8160-11ef-0a80-0325000aa865.sqlite',
    'C:\Users\Public\retail_diag.sqlite'
  )) {
    "=== $db ==="
    & $sqlite $db ".tables"
    & $sqlite $db "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';"
    & $sqlite $db "SELECT key, substr(value,1,150) FROM kv WHERE key LIKE '%shift%' LIMIT 5;" 2>&1
  }
}
Remove-PSSession $s
input.description: Compare sqlite schemas live vs diag

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred = New-Object PSCredential ('usr1cv8', $sec)
$opt = New-PSSessionOption -SkipCACheck -SkipCNCheck -SkipRevocationCheck
$s = New-PSSession -ComputerName 26.100.144.211 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -SessionOption $opt
Invoke-Command -Session $s -ScriptBlock {
  $sqlite = 'C:\Users\Public\sqlite-tools\sqlite3.exe'
  $live = 'C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\retail_2fd01358-8160-11ef-0a80-0325000aa865.sqlite'
  & $sqlite $live "PRAGMA integrity_check;"
  & $sqlite $live "SELECT count(*) FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';"
  & $sqlite $live "SELECT obj FROM shift WHERE rowid=1;" 2>&1
  & $sqlite $live "SELECT * FROM shift LIMIT 1;" 2>&1
}
Remove-PSSession $s
input.description: Integrity check and shift query on live sqlite

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred = New-Object PSCredential ('usr1cv8', $sec)
$opt = New-PSSessionOption -SkipCACheck -SkipCNCheck -SkipRevocationCheck
$s = New-PSSession -ComputerName 26.100.144.211 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -SessionOption $opt
$out = Invoke-Command -Session $s -ScriptBlock {
  $sqlite='C:\Users\Public\sqlite-tools\sqlite3.exe'
  $live='C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\retail_2fd01358-8160-11ef-0a80-0325000aa865.sqlite'
  $work='C:\Users\Public\retail_work.sqlite'
  Copy-Item 'C:\Users\Public\retail_diag.sqlite' $work -Force
  Get-Content 'C:\Users\Public\fix-shift.sql' | & $sqlite $work 2>&1 | Out-String
  $fixedObj = & $sqlite $work "SELECT obj FROM shift WHERE id='S_c1566556-5973-49c9-ad78-9d675e371635_Shift';"
  $jsonOk = $false
  try { $null = $fixedObj | ConvertFrom-Json; $jsonOk = $true } catch { $jsonOk = $false }
  # deploy if live empty
  $liveTables = & $sqlite $live "SELECT count(*) FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';"
  if ([int]$liveTables -lt 5) {
    Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Path -like '*moysklad-kassa*' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    Start-Sleep 2
    Remove-Item "$live-wal","$live-shm" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    Copy-Item $work $live -Force
  } else {
    Get-Content 'C:\Users\Public\fix-shift.sql' | & $sqlite $live 2>&1 | Out-String
    $fixedObj = & $sqlite $live "SELECT obj FROM shift WHERE id='S_c1566556-5973-49c9-ad78-9d675e371635_Shift';"
    try { $null = $fixedObj | ConvertFrom-Json; $jsonOk = $true } catch { $jsonOk = $false }
  }
  $liveObj = & $sqlite $live "SELECT obj FROM shift WHERE id='S_c1566556-5973-49c9-ad78-9d675e371635_Shift';" 2>&1

  # Update schtask: ONLOGON + highest + interactive for Admin
  schtasks /Delete /TN StartKassa211 /F 2>&1 | Out-Null
  $create = schtasks /Create /TN StartKassa211 /TR "C:\Users\Public\start-kassa-ready.bat" /SC ONLOGON /RU Admin /RL HIGHEST /IT /F 2>&1 | Out-String
  if ($create -match 'error|denied|access') {
    $create2 = schtasks /Create /TN StartKassa211 /TR "C:\Users\Public\start-kassa-ready.bat" /SC ONLOGON /RU usr1cv8 /RP usr1cv8 /RL HIGHEST /IT /F 2>&1 | Out-String
    $create = $create2
  }

  $logPath='C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\app.log.2026-07-07'
  $linesBefore=(Get-Content $logPath -EA SilentlyContinue|Measure-Object -Line).Lines
  $kassaExe=(Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files (x86)\moysklad-kassa\*.exe'|?{$_.Name -notmatch 'Uninstall'}|Select -First 1).FullName

  $attempts=@()
  # A: schtasks run
  schtasks /Run /TN StartKassa211 2>&1 | Out-Null
  Start-Sleep 12
  $c=(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process|?{$_.ExecutablePath -like '*moysklad-kassa*'}).Count
  $attempts += "schtasks_run:$c"

  if ($c -lt 1) {
    $p1 = & C:\Users\Public\PsExec.exe -accepteula -i 1 -d cmd /c C:\Users\Public\start-kassa-ready.bat 2>&1 | Out-String
    Start-Sleep 15
    $c=(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process|?{$_.ExecutablePath -like '*moysklad-kassa*'}).Count
    $attempts += "psexec_bat:$c|$($p1.Trim())"
  }
  if ($c -lt 1) {
    $p2 = & C:\Users\Public\PsExec.exe -accepteula -i 1 -d -u usr1cv8 -p usr1cv8 "`"$kassaExe`"" 2>&1 | Out-String
    Start-Sleep 15
    $c=(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process|?{$_.ExecutablePath -like '*moysklad-kassa*'}).Count
    $attempts += "psexec_exe:$c|$($p2.Trim())"
  }

  Start-Sleep 35
  $c65=(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process|?{$_.ExecutablePath -like '*moysklad-kassa*'}).Count
  Start-Sleep 45
  $linesAfter=(Get-Content $logPath -EA SilentlyContinue|Measure-Object -Line).Lines
  $tail=Get-Content $logPath -Tail 15 -EA SilentlyContinue
  $hits=Select-String -Path $logPath -Pattern 'access token|Boxed Error|boxed' -EA SilentlyContinue|Select -Last 6|ForEach-Object Line
  $procs=Get-CimInstance Win32_Process|?{$_.ExecutablePath -like '*moysklad-kassa*'}|Select Name,ProcessId,SessionId

  [pscustomobject]@{
    LiveTablesAfter = (& $sqlite $live "SELECT count(*) FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';")
    LiveShiftObj = $liveObj
    JsonOk = $jsonOk
    SchtaskCreate = $create.Trim()
    Attempts = $attempts
    ProcCount65 = $c65
    ProcCountFinal = @($procs).Count
    Procs = $procs
    LogLinesBefore = $linesBefore
    LogLinesAfter = $linesAfter
    LogHits = $hits
    LogTail = $tail
  }
}
Remove-PSSession $s
$out | Format-List *

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force
$cred = New-Object PSCredential ('usr1cv8', $sec)
$opt = New-PSSessionOption -SkipCACheck -SkipCNCheck -SkipRevocationCheck
$s = New-PSSession -ComputerName 26.100.144.211 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -SessionOption $opt
Invoke-Command -Session $s -ScriptBlock {
  $procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object {
    $_.Name -match 'moysklad|electron|CC57|kassa|Retail' -or ($_.CommandLine -and $_.CommandLine -match 'moysklad|MOYSKL')
  } | Select-Object Name,ProcessId,SessionId
  $sqlite='C:\Users\Public\sqlite-tools\sqlite3.exe'
  $live='C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\retail_2fd01358-8160-11ef-0a80-0325000aa865.sqlite'
  $obj = & $sqlite $live "SELECT obj FROM shift WHERE id='S_c1566556-5973-49c9-ad78-9d675e371635_Shift';"
  $bad = & $sqlite $live "SELECT count(*) FROM shift WHERE instr(obj,'{$type:com.lognex')>0;"
  $jsonOk = $false; try { $null = $obj | ConvertFrom-Json; $jsonOk=$true } catch {}
  $log='C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\app.log.2026-07-07'
  $hits = Select-String -Path $log -Pattern 'access token|Boxed Error|boxed|токен' -AllMatches -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 10 | ForEach-Object Line
  $tail = Get-Content $log -Tail 12 -Encoding UTF8
  schtasks /Query /TN StartKassa211 /V /FO LIST 2>&1 | findstr /I "TaskName Task To Run Logon Run As User Schedule Status"
  [pscustomobject]@{
    ProcCount=@($procs).Count
    Procs=$procs
    ShiftObj=$obj
    BadJavaFormat=$bad
    JsonOk=$jsonOk
    LogHits=$hits
    LogTail=$tail
  }
} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5
Remove-PSSession $s

  $s0=(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process|?{$_.Name -match 'moysklad|CC57|electron|kassa|Retail' -or $_.CommandLine -match 'MOYSKL'}|?{$_.SessionId -eq 0}).Count

input.final_summary:
**Kassa running:** **yes** — after `PsExec -i 1 -d -u usr1cv8` launching `C:\PROGRA~2\MOYSKL~1\CC57~1.EXE`, **10** MoySklad Kassa processes stayed up (5 in session **1**, 5 in session **0**) for 90s+.

**Start methods:** `schtasks /Run StartKassa211` and `start-kassa-ready.bat` alone did not show processes via WinRM; **PsExec interactive session 1** worked. **StartKassa211** was recreated: **ONLOGON**, `usr1cv8`, **InteractiveToken**, **HighestAvailable**, action `C:\Users\Public\start-kassa-ready.bat`.

**SQLite `shift.obj`:** Live DB `retail_2fd01358-…sqlite` had **0 tables** (broken); restored from `retail_diag.sqlite` + `fix-shift.sql`. Now valid JSON (`"$type":"com.lognex.retail.model.OpenShift",…`), `bad_java=0`, `ConvertFrom-Json` OK — **not re-corrupted**.

**app.log** (`app.log.2026-07-07`): **no new lines** since **10:26:25** local despite running processes; **no** “access token” or **Boxed Error** in file. Last entries: app start, FR settings load, deprecated store warning.

**User action:** On **26.100.144.211** RDP as **Admin** (session 1): confirm Kassa UI is visible and logged in; kill duplicate session **0** instances if needed; prefer one start via `C:\Users\Public\start-kassa-ready.bat` on the desktop. Scheduled task runs on **usr1cv8** logon — auto-start at reboot needs **usr1cv8** console logon or task retargeted to **Admin** (password required).

content.text:
## Remote kassa status (26.100.144.211)

| Item | Result |
|------|--------|
| **Kassa running** | **Yes** (stable 90s+) |
| **Process count** | **10** total — **5** in session **1** (interactive Admin desktop), **5** in session **0** (likely duplicates from repeated starts) |
| **What worked** | `C:\Users\Public\PsExec.exe -accepteula -i 1 -d -u usr1cv8 -p usr1cv8 C:\PROGRA~2\MOYSKL~1\CC57~1.EXE` |
| **What failed via WinRM alone** | `schtasks /Run StartKassa211` and non-interactive `start-kassa-ready.bat` did not keep processes visible until PsExec **-i 1** |

### `shift.obj` / SQLite
- Live DB `C:\Users\usr1cv8\AppData\Roaming\moysklad-kassa\retail_2fd01358-8160-11ef-0a80-0325000aa865.sqlite` was **empty** (0 tables).
- Restored from `C:\Users\Public\retail_diag.sqlite` and applied `C:\Users\Public\fix-shift.sql`.
- **`shift.obj` is valid JSON** (parses OK); corrupt `{$type:com.lognex…}` count **0**.

### `app.log` (after ~45s+ observation)
- File: `app.log.2026-07-07` — **last write 10:26:25**, **no new lines** after the PsExec start (~10:43).
- **No** “access token” lines; **no** Boxed Error in log.
- Recent snippet (unchanged since 10:26):
  - `"Запускаем приложение"` (app start)
  - FR settings loaded from `fr-settings.json`
  - Renderer: `.on in derived store is deprecated…`

### Scheduled task `StartKassa211`
- **Updated:** trigger **ONLOGON**, run `C:\Users\Public\start-kassa-ready.bat`, user **usr1cv8**, **InteractiveToken**, **HighestAvailable**.

### User action needed
1. **RDP to the box** (Admin is in session 1): confirm **Kassa window** is on screen and **logged in** (explains missing access-token log lines).
2. Consider **closing extra** session-0 Kassa processes; leave **one** stack (session 1), e.g. run `C:\Users\Public\start-kassa-ready.bat` once on the desktop.
3. **Auto-start on reboot:** task is tied to **usr1cv8** logon — either log in as **usr1cv8** at the console or recreate the task for **Admin** (needs Admin password).

[REDACTED]
